eventName: Getting Started with AI Agents: From Chatbots to Autonomous Tools
description: A beginner-friendly evening covering the fundamentals of AI agents. Learn how agents differ from chatbots, see live demos of tool-using agents, and build a simple agent yourself. No PhD required.
targetAudience: Developers new to AI agents, with basic Python knowledge

suggestedSpeakers.name: Marcus Johnson
suggestedSpeakers.reason: AI agents and tool use are his core topics. Rated 4.9 and specializes in making AI accessible to beginners.

suggestedSpeakers.name: Jordan Kim
suggestedSpeakers.reason: Can demo self-hosted agent setups. Great for live coding and workshop facilitation.

suggestedSpeakers.name: David Okafor
suggestedSpeakers.reason: Can cover agent security basics — prompt injection risks that every agent builder should know.

suggestedVenue.name: Community Maker Space
suggestedVenue.reason: Monitors and power at every seat — perfect for a hands-on agent building workshop. Capacity 40 matches estimate.

slots.title: What Are AI Agents? (And What They're Not)
slots.speaker: marcus-johnson
